cross-section discrepancy resolution: The value of 10,760.33 is taken from a formal financial statement section (table) and represents total trade receivables as of March 31, 2026. The other candidate value (11,507.13) is also from a financial statement but is less precise and appears to be a rounded figure. Therefore, the more precise value from the formal financial statement is chosen.

cross-section discrepancy resolution: Both candidate values are from the Management Discussion and Analysis section, which is less authoritative than formal financial statements. However, since they are the only available values and they represent the same fiscal year, I selected the first candidate value (4,143.72) as it is the first reported figure for Trade Payables in the section.

cross-section discrepancy resolution: The value of 1,510.82 is more likely to represent Cash and Cash Equivalents as it is a larger figure and typically cash balances are higher than smaller components. The section is also from the Management Discussion and Analysis, which is the correct fiscal year target.
